programme.title: Big Momma's House
programme.desc: In order to protect a woman from a robber, a male FBI agent disguises himself as an elderly woman.

programme.title: Bedazzled
programme.desc: Elliot Richards is a hapless young man consumed by unrequited love, and desperate to change his life, he makes a deal with the devil who slyly promises to do just that — for a price.

programme.title: Spy Next Door
programme.desc: A former CIA agent hoping to settle down with his girlfriend uses an opportunity to babysit her children as a chance to win them over. However, things take a dramatic turn when an old enemy shows up, forcing him back into his old lifestyle.

programme.title: Battling for Baby
programme.desc: After Katherine (Courteney Cox) decides to return to work to help pay the bills, her baby's grandmothers (Debbie Reynolds & Suzanne Pleshette) argue over who will take care of her child.

programme.title: The Internship
programme.desc: Old-school salesmen Billy (Vince Vaughn) and Nick (Owen Wilson) try to reboot their careers by joining Google’s fiercely competitive internship program — with hilarious results!

programme.title: Struck By Lightning
programme.desc: Carson Phillips is put in charge of publishing a school paper, but his fellow students aren't so keen to help. When he discovers a lot of the popular kids are keeping secrets, he decides to blackmail them in to helping him - what could possibly go wrong?

programme.title: Loophole
programme.desc: When architect Stephen Booker loses his partnership, he finds jobs hard to come by, and with money in short supply, he unwittingly becomes involved in a daring scheme to rob one of London's biggest bank vaults.

programme.title: A Chorus Line
programme.desc: After narrowing down hundreds of Broadway hopefuls, choreographer Zach (Michael Douglas) leads a select group of dancers on an audition that could change their lives forever in this stunning adaptation of the hit Broadway musical.

programme.title: Confessions from the David Galaxy Affair
programme.desc: Twin British sex-bombs Mary Millington and Rosemary England take on an astrologer who can bed women as easily as he can read fortunes! No-one goes home a Virgo - and Diana Dors adds to the glam!

programme.title: The Man From Utah
programme.desc: In a horse-riding rodeo contest bad guys want John Weston to lose. When he doesn't go along they add some insurance: a poisoned needle just under his saddle. Starring: John Wayne, Polly Ann Young, Anita Campillo

programme.title: Circus World
programme.desc: When circus proprietor Matt Masters decides to take his show on a European tour, it is beset by problems, while he searches for Lili, the mother of his adopted daughter, who disappeared years before. Starring: John Wayne, Rita Hayworth, Claudia Cardinale

programme.title: Outlaws And Angels
programme.desc: When outlaws invade the home of a seemingly innocent, frontier family, an unexpected game of cat and mouse ensues. This leads to seduction, and ultimately bloody revenge. Starring: Chad Michael Murray, Francesca Eastwood, Luke Wilson.

programme.title: Gleaming The Cube
programme.desc: A young avid skateboarder uncovers a conspiracy while investigating his adoptive brother's mysterious death.

programme.title: Elektra
programme.desc: Notorious assassin Elektra unwittingly takes part in her former teacher's test when she protects a former target and his daughter from "The Hand," a sinister crime syndicate of martial arts fighters.

programme.title: Highlander 3 - The Sorcerer
programme.desc: In feudal Japan, Connor McLeod seeks out an immortal master of illusion. He is followed by Kane. They fight and Kane is trapped in a cave. In the present, Connor's peace is destroyed when Kane is released and the struggle of the Gathering begins again.

programme.title: Despite The Falling Snow
programme.desc: In 1950s Moscow, communist Katya secretly spies for the Americans in the Cold War arms race. When she lands her biggest assignment, stealing secrets from rising government star Alexander, the last thing she expects is to fall in love with him.

programme.title: Dark Minds
programme.desc: A twisted psychological thriller about a man haunted by his past.

programme.title: Open Windows
programme.desc: A jilted fan soon finds himself pulled into a deadly game of cat-and-mouse after he accepts the opportunity to spy on his favorite actress via his laptop.

programme.title: Upside Down
programme.desc: Adam (Jim Sturgess, "Cloud Atlas") and Eden (Kirsten Dunst), a pair of star-crossed lovers separated onto twin worlds with opposite gravity, risk everything to reconnect.

programme.title: In Time
programme.desc: Justin Timberlake and Amanda Seyfried co-star in this sci-fi thriller set in a future world where aging stops at 25, and the only way for one man to stay alive is to steal more time.

programme.title: Infini
programme.desc: An elite 'search and rescue' team transport onto an off-world mining-facility to rescue Whit Carmichael, the lone survivor of a biological outbreak.

programme.title: The Simple Life of Noah Dearborn
programme.desc: Academy Award winners Sidney Poitier and Dianne Wiest star with Mary-Louise Parker in this enchanting tale about a quiet hero who becomes the talk of the town.

programme.title: The Lost Medallion
programme.desc: Billy Stone and Allie, two 13-year-old friends, uncover a long-lost medallion and accidentally wish themselves back in time. In order for Billy to save Allie's life, he must give up the medallion to the evil warlord, Cobra, who rules the island.

programme.title: Heidi
programme.desc: Classic story of a little Swiss girl, who after the death of her parents is sent to live with her goat herding grandfather (Max Von Sydow) in the high Alpine mountains.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Ghosts In The Machine
programme.desc: Ghosts in the Machine: Three tales of everyday objects that are haunted by the dead, including the story of a man who is attacked in bed by an invisible force.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Aliens Walk Among Us
programme.desc: Stories that suggest aliens are among us, including an Arizona woman who claims to have been fathered by an alien in a top-secret government experiment.

programme.title: Craig Charles: UFO Conspiracies: Phoenix Lights
programme.desc: On 13 March 1997 in the night sky over Phoenix, Arizona one of the most spectacular mass UFO sighting of all time took place. Thousands witnessed bright orange orbs moving in formation. This programme contains some flashing images.

programme.title: Craig Charles: UFO Conspiracies: Scotland
programme.desc: One of the world’s best UFO hotspots is very close to home. Craig and Sarah examine the Scottish UFO phenomena — a myriad of extraordinary cases, including the 1991 sighting of a glowing red disc. This programme contains some flashing images.

programme.title: Secrets In The Ice: Lost On Killer Mountain
programme.desc: Merging advanced scanning technology and scientific research, the series investigates the curiosities that have been lost for millennia, or never seen before, exploring how and why they ended up in the most desolate and distant corners of the planet.

programme.title: Secrets In The Ice: The Vanishing Of Flight CS-59
programme.desc: A secret underground military research station in the middle of the Greenland Ice Sheet is revealed as one of the most elaborate cover stories in the history of the Cold War.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Catherine reluctantly agrees to help Keppler deceive the team in order to catch a murderer

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Grissom is sent a miniature crime scene in a cardboard box to solve before it happens.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate the disappearance of a high-school cheerleader and her boyfriend.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Grissom and Greg investigate a drive-by shooting on a limo.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: A magazine mogul has been stabbed in a hip restaurant.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Lab technician Hodges convinces his colleagues that Grissom needs their help.

programme.title: Scorpion: Rogue Element
programme.desc: Team Scorpion must help protect Cabe's ex-wife after she uncovers evidence that suggests foul play in the death of a prominent congressman.

programme.title: Scorpion: Talismans
programme.desc: When a military plane is shot down in Bosnia, Team Scorpion must help recover its stealth technology before it falls into enemy hands.

programme.title: Scorpion: Revenge
programme.desc: When Sylvester accidentally triggers an explosive device during an investigation, Team Scorpion must focus on finding who's responsible even while their friend's life hangs in the balance.

programme.title: Scorpion: Dominoes
programme.desc: As Christmas approaches, Team Scorpion races to find a way to save a young boy's life after he gets trapped in a beachside cave and drowning is imminent.

programme.title: Scorpion: Kill Screen
programme.desc: Team Scorpion must help Ralph when the FBI questions him after his dark web game play inadvertently reveals the location of a CIA safe house and results in the murder of CIA operatives.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Best Laid Plans
programme.desc: 15 Division’s hunt for an armed robber leads them to the scene of a horrible car accident. While Andy deals with a woman pinned in her car, the other officers must track and apprehend the fugitive

programme.title: Rookie Blue: A Little Faith
programme.desc: When Traci and Andy are sent out on an undercover training exercise, they stumble upon a young woman who is about to die of an overdose. Meanwhile, Dov finds himself on a “ride-along” with a drug dealer and old friend of his deceased brother

programme.title: Rookie Blue: On The Double
programme.desc: When Gail Peck’s uniform is stolen, the rookies go after a vigilante who is impersonating a police officer. Meanwhile, Swarek’s off the grid, trying to get information out of former crime enforcer Jamie Brennan

programme.title: Rookie Blue: God’s Good Grace
programme.desc: While Swarek is brutally interrogated by Jamie Brennan in the basement of a Pickering farmhouse, the rookies help Andy solve a mystery that may reveal Swarek’s location

programme.title: Rookie Blue: The First Day of the Rest of Your Life
programme.desc: When a mysterious young girl vanishes from the scene of a multi-car accident, Andy McNally connects the girl to a 7-year-old cold case.

programme.title: Hercules in New York
programme.desc: Banished Hercules (Arnold Schwarzenegger) catches an escaped bear, cruises Broadway and wrestles professionally.

programme.title: Leprechaun
programme.desc: An Irish fairy (Warwick Davis) escapes from a crate and goes on a gory quest for his 100 stolen gold coins.

programme.title: Leprechaun in the Hood
programme.desc: When three rappers want to get even with a pimp, they accidentally unleash a leprechaun who goes on a killing rampage in tha 'hood.

programme.title: Folly to Be Wise
programme.desc: Following the efforts of a British army chaplain attempting to recruit entertainment acts to perform for the soldiers, and the complications that ensue when he is finally does.

programme.title: Blithe Spirit
programme.desc: A widower's second marriage is complicated by his first wife's disruptive ghost. Based on the play by Noel Coward.

programme.title: Hobson's Choice
programme.desc: A crusty old bootmaker attempts to retain his cheap source of labour by preventing his three daughters from marrying.

programme.title: The Constant Husband
programme.desc: An Englishman wakes in a hotel bedroom suffering from amnesia and sets out to find his identity. He tracks down his wife but soon learns that the job she saw him leave for every morning did not exist.

programme.title: JAG: Black Ops
programme.desc: A Naval aviator, while temporarily assigned to a SEAL team, drowns at sea; he was the son of a woman senator.

programme.title: JAG: Survivors
programme.desc: In a civilian court Harm represents a divorced (and emotionally baffled) Marine colonel, who has gotten into trouble over an unauthorized visit with his minor son.

programme.title: JAG: Recovery
programme.desc: A Navy astronaut dies during a drill while preparing for a space mission to repair a satellite

programme.title: JAG: Prisoner
programme.desc: Chicom agents capture Harm in Hong Kong; they vigorously question him in mainland China about official matters.

programme.title: JAG: Ares
programme.desc: Someone kills a Naval officer on Okinawa, then his ship encounters major trouble during war games at sea

programme.title: JAG: Skeleton Crew
programme.desc: The body of a woman Naval officer, a friend, and classmate of Harm, is found ashore.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Team One must figure out how to get a Chinatown gang to release a local shop owner, then they also have to figure out how to get the one who shot the owner's daughter free as well.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: An ex-cop with a grudge against Greg Parker takes him hostage and threatens to drop him off an arena's megatron if Greg can't talk him down. Meanwhile his team discovers that they are helpless to use tactical options to save their boss.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: When Spike answers Sam's sister's desperate plea for help, he is forced, at gunpoint, to help two criminals steal evidence from the fortress that is the Metro Evidence Depot.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Team One is called in to try and stop a conflict at a psychiatric hospital where a stabbing has just taken place.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Greg Parker immediately faces suspension from the team after keeping the relationship between two team members a secret.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: A fire captain who feels nothing he does is good enough is given the chance to prove to himself and to an injured member of his crew that he can set things right.

programme.title: Shortcut to Happiness
programme.desc: A down-and-out writer sells his soul to the devil in exchange for fame and fortune. Starring: Alec Baldwin, Anthony Hopkins, Kim Cattrall, Dan Aykroyd, Jennifer Love Hewitt

programme.title: Two Came Back
programme.desc: Susan is a seasoned sailor who agrees to help her friends bring a client's 68-foot boat from San Diego to Vancouver. After sailing the boat into a storm with disastrous consequences, the group is challenged to survive. Feat: Melissa Joan Hart.

programme.title: Left Behind
programme.desc: A small group of survivors are left behind after millions of people suddenly vanish and the world is plunged into chaos and destruction.

programme.title: 100 Years of Horror
programme.desc: The walking dead have been a mainstay of horror films for decades and Hollywood has made sure audiences will fear zombies anywhere and everywhere.

programme.title: 100 Years of Horror
programme.desc: A holdover from ancient tales, sorcerers have long fascinated movie audiences with their powerful use of black magic to achieve their evil goals.

programme.title: 100 Years of Horror
programme.desc: Of course theres Lon Chaney Jr. as The Wolf Man, but other films have featured werewolves in surprising ways over the years.

programme.title: The Revenge of Frankenstein
programme.desc: Baron Frankenstein escapes from the guillotine and goes to Germany. There, he names himself Dr. Stein and plans to restart his gruesome experiments. Starring: Peter Cushing, Francis Matthews, Eunice Gayson

programme.title: Harlequin
programme.desc: A dark fantasy thriller with political intrigue.

programme.title: Christmas Evil
programme.desc: A deranged Santa Claus unleashes terror on Christmas.

programme.title: Deadtime Stories
programme.desc: It’s all Sammy’s fault. If only he and Nina hadn’t been out in those woods in the first place. If only they hadn’t seen that creepy old tree with the strange little door.

programme.title: Deadtime Stories
programme.desc: Deadtime Stories is an anthology series based on the goosebump-inducing book series of the same name by Annette and Gina Cascone.

programme.title: The Ape Man
programme.desc: A crazed scientist accidentally turns himself into a half ape, half human creature, and scrambles to find a cure.

programme.title: The Vampire Bat
programme.desc: When corpses drained of blood begin to show up in an European village, town elders suspect a vampire on the loose.

programme.title: The Beast Must Die
programme.desc: Eight people have been invited to an island estate for the weekend. One of them is a werewolf. Can you guess which one?

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Can Matt make it as a doctor? His first day in the E.R. is grueling: he oversleeps, leaves his medical bag on the subway, and more.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Matt drops out, Martin moves in, and Peter wonders “what’s up” with his mother.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Three years after walking out, Peter’s father wants a second chance.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Martin fields a dream job offer and Chandler endures a family nightmare.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Marine officer Beau Brewer (Costas Mandylor) returns to Glenoak to discuss Martin’s plans for the future.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Cecilia “plays with matches,” and Ruthie’s school project causes an uproar.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: The slaying of a public health official while conducting an investigation into venereal disease leads McGarrett into the world of politics and intrigue. Jay Stewart and Mary Frann guest star.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: Keenan Wynn guest stars as the trusted friend of a Chinese diplomat who is the object of an assassination plan which Danny Williams stumbles upon, but whose details he cannot remember when he is injured.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: A family-dominated crime syndicate comes to the surface again after a long period of dormancy.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: The Vashon family launches a vendetta against McGarrett in this second installment of a trilogy dealing with an underworld dynasty in Hawaii.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: With his son in prison and his grandson dead — both as a result of McGarrett's actions, the patriarch of the Vashon crime syndicate, old Dominick, devises a cunning scheme to frame the chief of Five-O and send him to prison in disgrace.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver and Pete Thornton uncover a drug-smuggling operation while out in the wilderness on a Phoenix Foundation training program.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver matches wits with a killer who has sprung his buddy from the insane asylum cell they share, in a desperate bid to take revenge on the lady cop who put him away.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver's old nemesis, Murdoc, uses an unsuspecting Penny Parker as bait in a bizarre plan to lure MacGyver into a trap.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver learns that Pete Thornton's son, Michael, is involved in an international espionage ring stealing secrets from the Phoenix Foundation.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver intervenes in a war between two crime families to rescue the kidnapped son of a Phoenix Foundation lab technician.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Alex tells Elaine that her hectic schedule of being a mother, a cabbie and a museum employee is driving her crazy and that she should see a psychiatrist. Elaine decides that a quicker cure would be to spend the night with Alex.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Bobby and Tony’s friendship is on the line when they become embroiled in a hilarious love triangle and attempt to outdo each other in vying for the affection of a beautiful young lady.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The overweight blind date Alex once had returned to the scene a svelte shell of her former self, and eager for the romance she yearns for with Alex

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The riotous race of the century pits Alex against Louie in a winner-take-all bet to see who can bring in the most receipts. Lecherous Louie uses every dirty trick in the book to make sure he wins his prize—an evening with Elaine.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Elaine suddenly starts getting mysterious love letters. When she becomes intrigued by the poetic propositions, a couple of cabbies quickly claim responsibility, leaving Elaine with the hilarious task of discovering who is the amorous writer.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Louie makes a horrible first impression on girlfriend Zena’s parents on Taxi. Louie’s romance with girlfriend Zena takes an outrageous twist when she brings him home to meet her parents.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The cabbies try to make Tony a family man when they convince him to adopt the adorably precocious eight-year-old boy named Brian whom he befriended.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: It’s a hilarious shock to the cabbies when Rev. Jim brings his new pet to the garage—an over-the-hill racehorse that he bought after cashing in on the 300-to-1 long shot. However, he soon finds that it’s impossible to housebreak a horse.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Bobby faces a humorous predicament when it becomes obvious that one of the biggest talent managers in New York is representing him because of his prowess as a lover, and not for his ability as an actor.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: In a protest against unsafe equipment, the cabbies go on strike, and Louie offers an unusual solution to the problem to shop steward Elaine.

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: MONICA HELPS THE TOWN OUTCAST WHO IS ACCUSED OF HAVING MURDERED HER HUSBAND 35 YEARS EARLIER

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: On Christmas eve, Monica comforts a developmentally disabled boy who blames himself for his brother’s disappearance in a blizzard

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: When a woman murders her sister’s physically abusive husband, the siblings must confront the abuse they suffered as children at their father’s hand

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: When a drug-addicted mother and her baby disappear from the hospital, Monica and Tess must track them down before they both die

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: A baker in a small town is called upon by God to be a prophet and face-off against satan

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: A military base commander’s obsession with heroics puts the lives of his two sons in jeopardy

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Lost Contact
programme.desc: Sydney, Nigel and billionaire entrepreneur Rod Thorson parachute into the Myanmar jungle to rescue a relic-hunting team hired by Thorson to locate an ancient sacrificial bowl.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Cross of Voodoo
programme.desc: When two graduate students on the trail of the Haitian Cross of Utu disappear in New Orleans, Sydney and Nigel go down on the bayou to find them.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Roman Holiday
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel are on a trip, so Claudia decides to help Sydney's friend Roger to find Julius Caesar's armor, but relic hunting is not her talent.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: The Reel Thing
programme.desc: Working as consultants for an archeology adventure film, Sydney and Nigel realize the Pharaoh Amun II's props are genuine, long-thought lost relics. How can they be?

programme.title: Friday The 13th: The Series
programme.desc: Micki and Ryan throw a Halloween party at the shop to meet the neighbours, but two visitors inadvertently resurrect Uncle Vendredi's spirit.

programme.title: Friday The 13th: The Series
programme.desc: A gardener's assistant gets hold of a cursed mulcher. The wealthier and more valuable the person you feed into it, the more money that comes out.

programme.title: Matlock: The Clown
programme.desc: Matlock holds the last ray of hope for a veteran circus clown, Homer Fleming, accused of murdering his partner during a performance.

programme.title: Matlock: The Star
programme.desc: Ben Matlock uncovers plots within a plot when Noel Bishop, the wunderkind director of horror films, is accused of murdering motion picture star Catherine McKay as the cameras roll.

programme.title: Matlock: The Con Man
programme.desc: Ben Matlock has serious doubts about a code of ethics among con artists which is never supposed to include murder.

programme.title: Matlock: The Prisoner (Part 1)

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: The weary Sliders are nursed back to health in a monastery run by a group of people who are recording civilization's achievements to help future generations.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: After landing in a totalitarian world, Mallory (Robert Floyd) is paralyzed by a laser beam hit but later joins a commune of healers who alter him with a glittering liquid.

programme.title: Sliders

programme.title: Murder Masterminds: Murder In The Barnyard
programme.desc: A hog farmer claims his wife fell on a four-pronged rake and died - but there is a hole in his story and his wife's body holds the clue.

programme.title: Murder Masterminds: The Doctor Is Dead
programme.desc: The beautiful, highly popular Dr Teresa Sievers was a rising social media star when she was found bludgeoned to death in her Bonita Springs, Florida kitchen. It was the third suspicious death of a holistic doctor in recent weeks in the area.

programme.title: Sunshine Slayings
programme.desc: Kersten Kishnick and her boyfriend travel from Germany to Miami Beach, Florida, to enjoy a beautiful beachside vacation. During a night out on the town, the two get lost and a single gunshot in a sketchy part of town brings the good times to an end.

programme.title: Moesha: Pajama Jam
programme.desc: Mo asks Frank if she can go to a slumber party at Morgan’s house.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The We Ain't Going Out Like That Episode
programme.desc: When Nick tries to be spontaneous, but Suzanne resists and instead plans a date night that fails, they attempt to be spontaneous together--until they realize it's better if she makes plan.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Oh No She Di-in't Episode
programme.desc: Suzanne grows jealous of Nick's pretty young field producer. Elsewhere, Gigi falls for a man, who has children, so she enlists Kevin and Lindsey to help her better relate to kids.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Nick's Manny-Pedi Episode
programme.desc: Suzanne infiltrates Nick's night with the boys, so he retaliates by crashing her all-lady spa getaway.

programme.desc: When Marilyn throws a gold party at Nick and Suzanne's, and Nick learns Suzanne's wedding ring isn't real, he sets out to have a real ring made before Suzanne learns the truth.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Boy Has Style Episode
programme.desc: When Suzanne suspects that Lindsey's athletic new crush from school is gay, Nick sets out to prove that he isn't.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Suzanne Theft Auto Episode
programme.desc: Suzanne becomes overly consumed with Kevin's science project. Elsewhere, Lindsey revs up for driving lessons, only to emerge as a suspect when her mother's car is scratched.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Despicable E Episode
programme.desc: Lindsey's romantic attentions turn to a young celebrity DJ, who only neglects her in return. Elsewhere, Suzanne teaches Kevin the art of doing laundry. Michael Strahan and Lil JJ guest star.

programme.desc: When the Kingston-Persons decide to have a game night, all bets are off, as unlikely friends are drawn to one another when paired together for games.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: In 1989, Krista Martin's life is tragically cut short because of an intruder. A friend finds her and calls 911, starting an investigation that will span four decades.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: In Chandler, Arizona in 1991, an intruder viciously sexually assaults a woman in her own home. The case goes unsolved for decades until revolutionary science connects the dots.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: In 1995 in Beaumont, Texas, the parents of Catherine Edwards find her body in her bathroom. The killer evades justice, that is, until forensic science catches up with him.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: After police identify a murder victim thanks to her butterfly necklace, they discover that several of her colleagues had vendettas against her.

programme.title: Medical Detectives

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A Texan who vows to live a reformed life after being released from prison is subsequently convicted of murder, despite insisting his innocence, so he uses forensic science from behind bars to try to prove his case.

programme.desc: Man denies owing ex and her mother for car down payment. Accuses ex-lover of sending inappropriate emails about sex to his new girlfriend.

programme.desc: A report on the March 1988 murder of legendary racecar driver Mickey Thompson and his wife Trudy. Thompson’s sister is convinced that Michael Goodwin, her brother’s former partner, was the killer.

programme.desc: When a celebrity dog trainer is murdered, an heiress fears for her life and a bodyguard vows to be a hero.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Deal

programme.desc: 1905 Hand-crank Thomas Edison gramophone with cylindrical records; a discontinued Addictor 190 Mini Boat; a rare 1897 Regina music box.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Exiles
programme.desc: The Autobots are attacked by Steeljaw and his pack and driven from the Scrapyard. In the process, Sideswipe is nearly left behind, drudging up bad memories of his days alone on Cybertron.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Breathing Room
programme.desc: With quarters cramped in the cavern, Bumblebee and Fixit scout for a new living arrangement. Sideswipe and Strongarm venture out as well, and are trapped by Clampdown inside a shipping container.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Prepare for Departure
programme.desc: Grimlock goofs off while on monitor duty and misses a signal alert at the Nuclear Waste Disposal site. The Bee Team still gets there in time to engage Steeljaw and his Pack, but are waylaid in a crevasse and the Decepticons get away with nuclear material.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Prisoner Principles
programme.desc: When the BEE TEAM investigates a Decepticon signal near a nuclear power plant, they find QUILLFIRE and CLAMPDOWN. Quillfire escapes, but STRONGARM captures Clampdown. He reveals STEELJAW's plan to steal nuclear fuel rods from the power plant.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Collateral Damage
programme.desc: Optimus Prime arrives to warn the Bee Team about a breach in the Shadow Zone.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Something He Ate
programme.desc: The Bee Teamers return to the Scrapyard with their Decepticon captives, and find the place completely trashed. Sideswipe, Strongarm, and Grimlock balk at being assigned clean-up duty, asserting that they're warriors, not janitors.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Sick as a Bot
programme.desc: The Autobots suffer serious malfunctions after the Decepticon WINGCODE exposes them to harmful nanoparticles in an attempt to get her claws on the team's stash of Energon Cubes.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Five Fugitives
programme.desc: The Bee Team is about to catch their nemesis Steeljaw when they are interrupted by Strongarm's old mentor DROPFORGE, who arrives from Cybertron with orders to arrest them.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Enemy of my Enemy
programme.desc: Unannounced, Optimus returns to the scrapyard with an All-Star team of Autobot allies: Ratchet, Windblade, and Jazz, as well as Drift and his Mini-Cons.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Freedom Fighters
programme.desc: Surrounded and outgunned on Cybertron, the Bee Team and Steeljaw are in danger of seeing their mission to overthrow the oppressive High Council go up in smoke.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: Transform And Roll Out! Part 1

programme.title: Dino Ranch

programme.title: Dino Ranch
programme.desc: Both the Ranchers and the dinos must have the confidence to work separately to be reunited; the Cassidy's party set-up is foiled by the jilted Tinhorns, who think they weren't invited.

programme.title: Dino Ranch
programme.desc: When a Brontosaur leader gets separated from her herd, the Dino Ranchers need to keep the herd from scattering until she can reunite with them and lead the migration; Min tries to help Quack get over a scare without making a mistake.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: When a meteorite falls not far from the log cabin, strange berries start to grow. One of their properties is that they make anyone who eats them grow to disproportionate sizes.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: Under the wood floor of the log cabin, Grizzy and the Lemmings discover the entrance to an underground gallery with an old treasure card that indicates the location of a treasure.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: When he brandishes an Indian sceptre that the Lemmings brought home with other antique objects, Grizzy sees the Lemmings bow low before him and behave like servants.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy tries to impress the she-bear that he's in love with by making a sculpture of her from a piece of wood. But as soon as the artist's back is turned, the Lemmings gnaw at the work of art in order to transform it into a toboggan slide.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: The Lemmings throw a surprise birthday party for one of the clan. When Happy Birthday rings out, the surprise is as great for Grizzy, who is trying to take a nap after a hearty meal, as it is for the birthday Lemming hero in question.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: A gust of wind sweeps away the flower that Grizzy's adored she-bear wears in her hair. Grizzy sees this as a golden opportunity to dazzle her by bringing it back.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy finds two identical vases that are actually communicating vessels in a Native American Indian chest. If he sticks his hand in one, it comes out the other, regardless of the distance between them.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy finds a vintage stopwatch in the garage which lets one wind back the minute that has just passed by, and it can even stop time and movement in one's surroundings.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy is disturbed in the middle of his TV snack by a flow of incongruous objects that have been transformed into hot-air balloons.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy discovers with great delight that the ranger has purchased a brand new multi-function Stressless recliner. But the Lemmings transform it into a fearsome multi-game chair.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: Goku and Vegeta search for two worthy members to join the team to fill out its ranks, allowing them to participate in the tournament, but it is unclear who will be worthy to face the Sixth Universe alongside them.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: Jaco takes Bulma to the all-knowing alien, Master Zuno, to learn more about the Super Dragon Balls; Jaco and Bulma run across an intergalactic criminal and take him down.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: Everyone gathers to head to the tournament, but Goku and Vegeta hold things up by arriving late from training. Once on the `Planet With No Name', the fighters size up their competition, which includes a Saiyan from Universe Six.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: Goku and Botamo kick off their match and Botamo displays a surprising resilience to Goku's attacks; Goku faces his next opponent, Frost, a close doppelganger of his universe's Frieza.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: Vegeta demands that Cabba transform into a Super Saiyan during their battle, but when Cabba cannot, Vegeta reverts to his old, malicious ways and threatens to kill him.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super

programme.desc: Bob and the team are building a special flat-packed eco-home for Marjorie. When Muck and Benny spot Marjorie’s canvas tent and Spud’s straw-house, they wonder what else houses can be made from.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Pam Goody is running out of money to complete the Arts Centre renovations and Molly suggests holding a fashion show to raise funds. Pam thinks this a wonderful idea and asks Molly to organise it. Bob is, of course, just the man to build a catwalk.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Mr Ellis needs Bob to replace an old rotten beam in his cottage. The gang set off for Mr Ellis’s and Pilchard sneaks along – she knows that cottages are popular with mice! At the cottage, Mr Ellis reports some strange goings-on at the cottage.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob is building a marshland walkway with his Dad’s help. Benny hears that the marsh is ‘like a jungle’ and becomes determined to finds some jungle animals like tigers. Every time he spots one, however, it turns out to be something very ordinary.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob and the gang are replacing some old pipes outside the town hall. Molly, meanwhile, is practicing for her first aid exam with a reluctant JJ as guinea pig. When Wendy calls JJ’s yard to order a special pipe and Molly offers to deliver it.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: A new machine has come to the Valley – Packer the Delivery Truck. He’s to work with Farmer Pickles team. Farmer Pickles gives Packer his jobs and he sets off on his first delivery round.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Scrambler is desperate to help Bob build a drying barn for Farmer Pickles sunflower farm. Scruffty is also excited about the building job and runs and jumps about getting in everyone’s way.

programme.title: Scrambler to the Rescue
programme.desc: Its winter in Sunflower Valley and Bob and his team are building a concert hall in time for a special winter celebration. Scrambler is especially keen to help – but is frustrated that there’s nothing for an energetic quad-bike to do!

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob is replacing a potting shed on Mr Beasley’s allotment. In the old shed is a chest which Mr Beasley doesn’t need any more. Meanwhile Wendy calls at JJ’s for the materials for the new shed.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: The Team are converting Mr Sabatini’s windmill into a café. Roley is rolling the ground flat for all the tables and chairs while Bob makes the awnings. Roley hits trouble when molehills keep appearing where he’s just been rolling.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob is building an extraordinary new cave-house for Sandy Beach – a caveman expert who’s moving to the valley to study how cavemen used to live. The team are all head into the mountains.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Farmer Pickles has decided to open a camp site on his land, and Bob is installing a shower block and fence to keep the sheep out. For once, he is working on his own while Wendy goes on holiday with Jenny.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Robert’s come to the valley to spend some quality time with Bob. They have a plan to spend the afternoon birdwatching – Robert wants to see the very rare lesser-striped sunflower warbler.

programme.desc: Newcomer Margie Cooper battles it out with veteran Mark Stacey, starting the week in Chilham, Kent, and ending at auction in Heathfield, East Sussex.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It couldn't be closer as Margie Cooper and Mark Stacey go hunting that antique gem, from Rochester in Kent to a showdown in Colchester in Essex.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Margie Cooper and Mark Stacey continue their journey, from Sawbridgeworth in Hertfordshire to an auction in Chippenham, Wiltshire.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Its day four. Margie Cooper and Mark Stacey start the day in the New Forest in Hampshire ending at an auction showdown in Sherborne.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's all down to the last lot as Margie Cooper and Mark Stacey battle it out to from in Hele Exeter to Torquay for the final auction showdown.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Old hand Thomas Plant and newbie Mark Hales take to the road, going head-to-head as they try and out-buy and out-sell each other. They start their journey in Portrush, Northern Ireland and end up for an auction in Belfast.

programme.title: Break of Throw: Students of the Game
programme.desc: Glen Durrant breaks down the throws of two students of the game, Connor Scutt and Brian Raman.

programme.title: An Audience with Phil Taylor
programme.desc: Join Phil Taylor at the Live Lounge in an exclusive Q&A, sharing his top career moments and personal memories.

programme.desc: 24/7 Darts! Including live coverage of the Pluto TV MODUS Super Series tournament, six days a week, 50 weeks a year. Plus plenty of exclusive darts content, with news, views and interviews with the biggest names and personalities on and off the oche!

programme.title: Tungsten Talk

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries
programme.desc: This episode includes: Mother's Instinct, Temple President Murder, Swoops & Squats & UD, Grady's Bible and Rapist MD.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries
programme.desc: This episode includes: Oklahoma City Rescuers, UD: Baby Given Away, Carolina Cop Killer & UD, Vince Foster and Crime Novelist.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries
programme.desc: This episode includes: Incredible Journeys (Pts. 1 & 2), Interceptors, UD: Shroud of Turin and Whistle Blown (Pts. 1 & 2).

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina
programme.desc: This episode includes: David Lee Kemp, Missing Susan, Nazi War Treasure, Sean Don Con and After Death Visits.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode: 6
programme.desc: This episode includes: BC Sea Monster, Jumping Off Place, UD: Thelma & Louise, Fatherly Love? & UD, Postal Crime and Miss Subways.

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: Something stood behind me!
programme.desc: The team are joined by investigator Miki York, as they investigate an 18th century hall and grounds. Phantom children have been witnessed among many strange incidents, and a haunted basement awaits. But who will lead this investigation?

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: I'm so scared
programme.desc: A large haunted and abandoned hotel without electricity in Wales is the venue in this episode, where phantom figures, unexplained voices, and footsteps have been experienced. Investigator Mark Nicholas joins the team. But who will take charge tonight?

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: Are you kidding me!?
programme.desc: A ghostly white lady, phantom footsteps, and more have been reported at this quirky haunted guest house. Fellow investigator Adam Morgan joins the team as they witness for themselves some of the reported phenomenon. Who will Sara put in charge tonight?

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Burning Betrayal
programme.desc: When 20-year-old Kim Antonakos disappears after a late night out in Manhattan, her father files a missing persons report.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Family Ties
programme.desc: When Mildred ‘Miss Louise’ Williams disappears from her small Maryland town, local police don’t take the case seriously.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Out of the Dark
programme.desc: Described as a brutal execution, 46-year-old grandmother Chattrice Maihi-Carroll was found naked, stabbed to death in her New Zealand home in 2008. There were multiple suspects and everything seemed resolved following the arrest of a neighbour.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Lost Soul
programme.desc: In 1985, 25-year-old Luana 'La Verne' Williams disappeared from her Tauranga home. Eight years later her disappearance was upgraged to a murder enquiry. Her body has never been found.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Looking for Justice
programme.desc: This week, for the first time ever, the prime suspect in a murder enquiry has turned to Sensing Murder for help.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Into Thin Air
programme.desc: Jim Donnelly was a hard-working family man living a quiet life in suburban Auckland. For 20 years he’d worked as a scientist at the Glenbrook Steel Mill, south of Auckland. On the 21st of June 2004, he simply vanished into thin air.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Soul Searching
programme.desc: For the first time ever, TAPS revisits Belcourt Castle in Newport, Rhode Island to investigate claims surrounding a deceased friend.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Titanic Terror
programme.desc: TAPS gets on board the Titanic Exhibit at the Georgia Aquarium in Atlanta to investigate paranormal claims that have traveled around the world with the artifacts.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Crossing Over
programme.desc: TAPS calls in the GHI team to investigate the Spalding Inn, a historic property in Whitefield, New Hampshire owned by Jason and Grant.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Garden State Asylum
programme.desc: The TAPS team travels to New Jersey to investigate the infamous Essex County Hospital.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Inhuman Entity
programme.desc: The TAPS team answers a call from a family in Blackstone, Massachusetts being plagued by a demonic entity.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Suicide Possession
programme.desc: Joan and her boyfriend Tony are seeing apparitions in their New Jersey home. Both are concerned that the spirits are influencing their behavior: a non-drinker, Tony has turned to the bottle while Joan has thoughts of harming herself.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Dwelling of the Dead
programme.desc: A single mom claims she is being physically assaulted by a spirit in her Kentucky home. Ryan first explores a natural explanation for the alleged phenomena. But the client's five-year-old son also sees spirits, and his sightings appear to line up.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Name
programme.desc: Ryan Buell and company set out on one of their most dangerous cases to date - to help a single mother who is experiencing paranormal activity in a home that was once the site of brutal murder.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Woman in the Window
programme.desc: Ryan and his team lend paranormal assistance to a family who lives in a historic home that was once a part of the Underground Railroad. Does the answer to their haunting lie in the mysterious tunnels beneath the house?

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Fire
programme.desc: Christina has been experiencing paranormal activity ever since her father and step-mother were murdered near Columbus, OH last year. PRS and psychic/medium?Chip Coffey delve into a open murder case and wind up exposing a family divide.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Firehouse
programme.desc: Everyone from the chief to the trainees at the Clementon Fire Department is convinced that the ghost of a former member is haunting their firehouse.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Spirits of the Slave Dungeon
programme.desc: Ryan books a two-night case in a real haunted jail in Charleston, SC, but PRS soon realizes the spirits themselves are being held there against their will and subjected to an unjust form of torture.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Satan's Soldier
programme.desc: Mark and Kim can't sleep through the racket caused by unseen forces in their central Indiana home. When PRS and Psychic/Medium Michelle Belanger discover what appears to be blood in the basement, they investigate a history of violence in the home.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Get Out of This House
programme.desc: When an aggressive spirit stalks a young family, PRS is called in to investigate. When it is determined that the source of the haunting may have been unknowingly invited in, Ryan races to identify and hopefully defeat the entity before it's too late.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Devil in Jersey
programme.desc: PRS delves deep into the pine barrens of the Garden State to separate myth from reality about the so-called "Jersey Devil." Accompanied by a cryptozoologist the team interviews eye witnesses and experts in search of the truth.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Return of the Dead: Glove II
programme.desc: PRS returns to the site of one of their most famous cases, Daisytown, PA, where they had discovered a glove print of an old miner that they determined was the spirit of a Great-Grandfather.

programme.title: Most Haunted: HMP Shrewsbury Part 3
programme.desc: The concluding part of the teams biggest investigation sees Yvette get the biggest shock of.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Abbey House Museum
programme.desc: Yvette introduces a brand new Most Haunted team member, Watson, a bulldog. This location starts to give up its mysteries as soon as the team arrive and they have go film differently to accommodate a particularly aggressive poltergeist.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Wentworth Woodhouse stable
programme.desc: The first team ever to be allowed into the very haunted Wentworth Woodhouse Stable Block and the team film the best evidence ever, has a ghost been caught on camera? Watson sees something and team see someone who couldn’t possibly have been there.

programme.title: Most Haunted: The Slaughter House
programme.desc: The Slaughterhouse is Liverpool’s oldest pub and gives the team more than they bargained for as object are moved from underneath the team’s noses.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Todmoredon Church
programme.desc: For the first time Yvette takes her fearless Most Haunted team to an ordained church and graveyard. But it’s the cellar that proves the most fearful as the team get caught in a small room and they are not alone.

programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: The Nightmare, The Stalker, The Impossible Car Dream, The Dresser, The Burial.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 2
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: One for the Road, The Music Box, Two to One, Damsel, The Horn.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 7
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: Connie, Positive I.D., Trucker, Cook Out, The New House.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 8
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: Creepy Comics, Louie the Dip, The Wailing, The Landlady, Curse.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 6
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: The Dorm, The Child Artist, The Weatherman, Sit-Down Comedian, Room 245.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 10

programme.title: A Haunting: A Haunting in Florida
programme.desc: Ed, Beth and their toddler soon learn they are not alone at their ranch house.

programme.title: A Haunting: Gateway To Evil
programme.desc: Devastated by a friend’s murder, Julisa holds a séance to communicate one last time--and unwittingly invites a dark spirit into her home…and her life. Julisa and her mother believe that she has re-ignited the evil that plagued her mother years ago.

programme.title: A Haunting: Trapped In Terror
programme.desc: Soon after moving into an older home in a quaint suburb of Cincinnati, OH, Taylor Jones catches her mother practicing black magic in her daughter Isabelle’s bedroom. Her fears become reality when Taylor notices Isabelle playing with an invisible friend.

programme.title: A Haunting: Where Evil Lurks
programme.desc: Soon after the Shea family moves into their new home, eerie noises and ghostly voices begin.

programme.title: A Haunting: Demons Never Die
programme.desc: Shortly after starting a new job and moving his family to the suburbs, Bill Toler suspects his house is haunted. Paranormal investigators uncover a portal in their home and discover a demon followed Bill home from his job at the state penitentiary.

programme.title: A Haunting: House of Nightmares
programme.desc: When Tracey Berrios experiences paranormal activity inside her new home, she suspects spirits tied to the house's history. But after something evil attacks Tracey, she fears for the safety of her family and turns to paranormal investigators for help.

programme.title: Spy Next Door
programme.desc: A former CIA agent hoping to settle down with his girlfriend uses an opportunity to babysit her children as a chance to win them over. However, things take a dramatic turn when an old enemy shows up, forcing him back into his old lifestyle.

programme.title: The Internship
programme.desc: Old-school salesmen Billy (Vince Vaughn) and Nick (Owen Wilson) try to reboot their careers by joining Google’s fiercely competitive internship program — with hilarious results!

programme.title: Good Luck Chuck
programme.desc: A handsome but slightly self-involved dentist (Dane Cook) discovers that he is a walking good-luck charm, as women inevitably find their soul mate right after dating him.

programme.title: Struck By Lightning
programme.desc: Carson Phillips is put in charge of publishing a school paper, but his fellow students aren't so keen to help. When he discovers a lot of the popular kids are keeping secrets, he decides to blackmail them in to helping him - what could possibly go wrong?

programme.title: First Daughter
programme.desc: Samantha Mackenzie wants what every college freshman desires: to experience life away from home and parents. It's not going to be easy, however, because home for Sam is the White House, and her dad is the President of the United States.

programme.title: She's Funny That Way
programme.desc: A married Broadway director falls for a call-girl-turned-actress and works to help her advance her career, but things get a little more complicated than they bargained for.

programme.title: Confessions from the David Galaxy Affair
programme.desc: Twin British sex-bombs Mary Millington and Rosemary England take on an astrologer who can bed women as easily as he can read fortunes! No-one goes home a Virgo - and Diana Dors adds to the glam!

programme.title: Candy Stripe Nurses
programme.desc: Marisa, Dianne and Sandy are three sexy teenagers who work as candy stripers at a local hospital.

programme.title: Naked Vengeance
programme.desc: A beautiful woman seeks revenge for the tragedy forced upon her family.

programme.title: Red Headed Stranger

programme.title: Young Guns

programme.desc: Patrick Bradford, was convicted of stabbing his mistress to death. Determined to win his acquittal, Deborah Nolan, a close friend, and staunch supporter of Bradford’s, quit her teaching job and went to law school to take on his defense.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Taken: The Amber Dubois Story
programme.desc: A report on the February 2009 disappearance of Amber Dubois, just blocks from Escondido High School in California. 48 HOURS examines the permanent impact her disappearance has had on her family, even after the discovery and conviction of the murderer.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: When a 17-year-old girl breaks up with her abusive boyfriend, he snaps and breaks into her bedroom to attack her.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Last Chance
programme.desc: Attorneys work to get a death row inmate who confessed to a crime he didn't commit out of prison.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Ghosts of Greenwich
programme.desc: A report on the murder of 15-year-old Martha Moxley in Greenwich, Connecticut and the new developments in Kennedy family member Michael Skakel’s efforts to overturn his 2002 murder conviction of Moxley.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: The 2017 murder of famed hairstylist Fabio Sementilli who was found stabbed to death by his pool in Los Angeles. At first, police believed he was the victim of the “knock-knock” burglars, a ring targeting Hollywood celebrities.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Deal
programme.desc: Robert Webber guest stars as Charles Rogan, a syndicate leader with the key to the five million dollar bankroll that will finance the overthrow the government of Camagua.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Leona
programme.desc: Robert Goulet guest stars as Joe Epic, a syndicate crime leader and key figure in an IMF plan to free a captured undercover agent.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: TOD-5
programme.desc: To locate a terrorist ring called Alpha Group, the IMF convinces turncoat intelligence agent Gordon Holt (played by guest star Peter Haskell) that he's been exposed to the stolen biological weapon he's been hired to deliver.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Cocaine
programme.desc: William Shatner guest stars as Joe Conrad, a drug dealer who becomes the unwitting dupe of the Impossible Missions Force in their plan to capture the largest shipment of cocaine ever brought into the country.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Underground

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Mr. Haff Goes to Washington
programme.desc: Ton and Allen invade the Nation's capital, but meet strong resistance from local bidders. The guys uncover a Civil War era black powder revolver and a stash of South African gold coins!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: It's Raining Ton
programme.desc: The guys take Big Sis to her first auction - and when things get ugly, she becomes their secret weapon. Ton tests out a "blob" and Allen gets shot with a riot gun.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Money Makin' Monster Machines
programme.desc: The Auction Hunters team goes on the attack & ends up on a collision course with a hardened veteran auction buyer. They uncover a collection of speedy off-road vehicles and some hardcore heavy metal from the turn-of the-century!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Auction Hunters, Ink.
programme.desc: Autographed 1960s Bob Shaw Swing Gate tattoo machine; Terry Ives competition 22hp chainsaw; six foot chainsaw-carved cedar bear.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Big Score
programme.desc: At a climate-controlled storage facility in downtown L.A., Allen and Ton's locker wins score them an antique cash register and a German H&K pistol prized by collectors.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Chi-Town Showdown
programme.desc: Metal Victorian-era burial casket; 1870s glass fire extinguisher grenades; a mechanical 1896 handcrafted Chicago fire station alarm box.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Blazing Saddles
programme.desc: Ton and Allen head to a Hollywood auction and face a new competitor with a seemingly endless cash flow. After they uncover a triple barrel shotgun and an antique camel saddle, Allen confronts an old childhood fear.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Without a Chute
programme.desc: After a tough auction, things get worse when the shop's landlord wants to talk to the guys. Ton tries to negotiate with him while Allen has to put an experimental powered parachute to the test to save the day's profits.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Cashville, Tennessee

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Carolyn Goes Topless
programme.desc: A friendly competition with former employee Carolyn turns into a vicious battle for a 1968 Corvette Stingray, giving Carolyn the last laugh. Allen tests his Ninja skills with an antique sickle weapon.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Little-Ton Jones
programme.desc: Allen & Ton try to get the inside scoop on their competition by chatting up local auction buyers. The guys find some heavy gold-mining machinery from the 1950s & an amateur rocket that can travel faster than the speed of sound!

programme.title: Australia's Wild Places: The Coast of the Whalesharks

programme.title: Wildest Islands: Falkland Islands: Penguin Paradise
programme.desc: The Falkland's bleak, battered, and windswept archipelago lies 460 km from the South American mainland. Rugged mountains and expansive pristine coastline are a unique home for wildlife  especially for one of the world's most iconic flightless birds.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: For centuries, farmers have been discovering strange, complex geometric patterns comprised of rings, circles and other intricate shapes in their fields.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Mystery of Oak Island
programme.desc: Richard investigates Canada's best-known mysteries, the Oak Island treasure. Also known as the money pit, the site has become one of the world's deepest and most costly archaeological digs.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Energy Healing
programme.desc: Several energy healers claim they are able to produce spontaneous miraculous healing through a laying on of hands. Claims of similar such healing by a man in a remote village in Brazil, known as John of God are also examined.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Execution of MLK and The Framing of James Earl Ray
programme.desc: In this re-examination of the assassination of civil rights leader Martin Luther King, Richard meets several researchers who provide evidence that the convicted gunman, James Earl Ray was not the real triggerman.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Birthers - Obama's Birth Certificate
programme.desc: Richard interviews several prominent 'Birthers' who present evidence that proves Barack Obama is not eligible to be President because he does not meet the qualifications of a natural born citizen.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: RFID Chips

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Guns & Ice

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: The Good Fight

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: The Smackdown of Baby Lyssa

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: A Friend in Need
programme.desc: Roger has 27 prior arrests, spent years in jail and doesn't want to go back. But he's missed court and now Dog has to bring him in. To complicate matters, this fugitive lives in a tightly-knit community where good information won't come easy.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Your Lying Eyes

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Crime Don't Pay

programme.title: Arthur: George Scraps His Sculpture/Arthur's Big Meltdown

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: Transform And Roll Out! Part 1
programme.desc: The evil Decepticons have appeared in Detroit. With the all powerful Allspark, Megatron can use it to turn all of Earth's robots into Decepticons.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: Transform And Roll Out! Part 2

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: Along Came A Spider

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: Sound & Fury

programme.desc: Mr Sabatini has decided to move from Bobsville to set up the Sunflower Valley bakery. Bob and the team are going to build him a new house close to the river. Muck asks if Spud can tag along as he’s been telling him exciting stories.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: An old Willow tree has toppled over and needs to be chopped down. Lofty and Bob are going to make it safe and use the wood for other things. Meanwhile Travis and Sumsy wonder why they haven’t got a shelter of their own like Bob’s machines.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Its early morning in Sunflower Valley and Benny arrives bursting with enthusiasm. He’s not needed in Bobsville today and he’s come to the Valley to help. Today, the team are building Mr and Mrs Bentley’s special new house.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: The whole town is practicing for an egg and spoon race, which Mrs Percival has organised. Trix decides to enter, but unfortunately she practices with fresh eggs and in her usual haste she manages to make a great mess in JJ’s yard.

programme.title: Built to be Wild
programme.desc: Yeeee-haaw! Its hoedowns and showdowns for Bob the Builder and his machine team as they hit the trail to the Wild West for their fourth feature length adventure - BUILT TO BE WILD!

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob has volunteered to look after the farm whilst Farmer Pickles takes Humpty to a pig show. Bob arrives with Lofty at the crack of dawn whilst Wendy is due later to repair the roof on the barn.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob is building a pavilion in the park to celebrate the annual flower show. Molly has built a special statue of a horse for the occasion which is to be unveiled at the opening ceremony.

programme.title: Homes and Playgrounds
programme.desc: Join Bob and his “Can-Do” crew as they go back on site to show you the exciting real world of big machines! From bird’s nests to houses, we all need a home and in this brand new adventure Bob explains how they are built.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Travis is delighted to receive his own Talkie Talkie and can’t wait to make good use of it. Mr Beasley arrives in the valley with a load of yoghurt pots as he heard something on the radio about making them into a house.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Old hand Thomas Plant and newbie Mark Hales take to the road, going head-to-head as they try and out-buy and out-sell each other. They start their journey in Portrush, Northern Ireland and end up for an auction in Belfast.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Its game on as Thomas Plant and Mark Hales travel from Dublin to Ballybrittas, Portlaoise, in the Republic of Ireland for an auction showdown

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's day three for Thomas Plant and Mark Hales as they battle for the biggest profit. Beginning in Ironbridge, Shropshire, they head to Froncysyllte in North Wales for the auction.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Thomas Plant and Mark Hales battle it out as they start the day in Newport Pembrokeshire and end up at auction showdown Llandeilo in Carmarthenshire.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Family Ties
programme.desc: When Mildred ‘Miss Louise’ Williams disappears from her small Maryland town, local police don’t take the case seriously.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Fatal Extraction
programme.desc: A Pennsylvania factory-town is terrified when Dr. John Yelenic, a much-loved, local dentist is found murdered in his home.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Femme Fatality
programme.desc: A recent Harvard grad, 23-year-old Laura Houghteling, has just moved home to begin a promising new career as a Washington, D.C. lawyer.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Suddenly Psychic
programme.desc: When a 31-year-old nurse and single mother, Melanie Uribe, is carjacked in an L.A. suburb, police find her burned out truck the same night, but no trace of the victim.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Halloween Homicide
programme.desc: It’s Halloween night 2004, and two popular young women are brutally stabbed to death in their Napa Valley home.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Taken By Storm
programme.desc: In the icy waters of the Atlantic off the coast of Maine, a lobster boat fails to return from a day of setting traps. With no Mayday, no word from the crew, the Coast Guard knows it has to act fact.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Jason Williams
programme.desc: Jason Williams goes out to meet friends for a night of drinking. He never returns. His family is frantic, it’s uncharacteristic of him to be out of touch.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Amie Hoffman
programme.desc: Teenager Amie Hoffman disappears after work one night. Police are on the case but when a family friend calls psychic Nancy Weber, she sees Amie’s murder in a bizarre vision.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Margie Calciano
programme.desc: Detective Robert Wanner consults psychic Lauren Thibodeau to help with a case that has left him stumped. Surprisingly she instead offers clues on a cold case that’s been worrying Wanner for years.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Rachel Domas
programme.desc: Can a veteran psychic and a rookie cop crack a case of a missing fourteen-year-old girl? Rachel Domas misses her school bus and walks the 3 miles home. She’s never seen again.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Into Thin Air
programme.desc: Jim Donnelly was a hard-working family man living a quiet life in suburban Auckland. For 20 years he’d worked as a scientist at the Glenbrook Steel Mill, south of Auckland. On the 21st of June 2004, he simply vanished into thin air.

programme.title: Sensing Murder
programme.desc: “Sensing Murder” psychics are challenged to connect with the spirit of 53-year-old, Cynthia Greenwood-Smith, to unravel the lies and discover the grim truth surrounding her disappearance from her Gold Coast home in 2001.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Where There's Smoke
programme.desc: In 2006, 19-year-old Blake Stott died in a mysterious car fire. Blake had seemingly pulled into a South Otago lay-by to have a sleep, when his late-model, un-modified car burst into flames.

programme.title: Sensing Murder
programme.desc: Our new team of “ Sensing Murder” psychics are challenged to unmask the killer – or killers – of vivacious New Zealand hairdresser Paula Brown who was plucked from Sydney’s downtown after a night out with friends.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Inhuman Entity
programme.desc: The TAPS team answers a call from a family in Blackstone, Massachusetts being plagued by a demonic entity.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: I Am Not Guilty
programme.desc: The TAPS team investigates the home of Dr. Samuel Mudd, an alleged conspirator to the assassination of Abraham Lincoln.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Civil War Spirits
programme.desc: The site of the bloodiest battle of the Revolutionary War sets the stage for an unforgettable investigation by TAPS.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Essex County Penitentiary
programme.desc: The TAPS team is joined by Destination Truthhost Josh Gates as the team returns to Essex County, New Jersey to investigate a notorious penitentiary with a horrifying past.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Judgment Day
programme.desc: TAPS calls in Bruce Tango, father of Dave Tango, to help investigate a place close to his heart, the Union County Courthouse, a historic property in Elizabeth, NJ.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Little Drummer Boy
programme.desc: TAPS has received an urgent call for help from a Chicago community center whose patrons are being chased away by a variety of menacing spirits.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Return of the Dead: Glove II
programme.desc: PRS returns to the site of one of their most famous cases, Daisytown, PA, where they had discovered a glove print of an old miner that they determined was the spirit of a Great-Grandfather.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Permission To Do Harm
programme.desc: When a mirror levitates and shatters on its own, P.R.S. heeds the call to investigate a spirit that has been unleashed on an unsuspecting family. Ryan must track down the spirit and contain it before it does irreparable damage.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Asylum
programme.desc: PRS explores a New York State Prison that was once a mental asylum. Ryan and his team go behind bars to uncover the institution's paranormal past and present.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Devil in Syracuse
programme.desc: The clients are new, but the spirit is all too familiar as Ryan Buell prepares himself to battle the taunting demon that has been following him.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Room 37
programme.desc: Darrell and Cherry, the owners of an historic Tennessee bed and breakfast built in the late 1800s, are reporting apparitions of a man and hearing whistling throughout the hotel corridors.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Do Bad Things
programme.desc: After receiving a letter requesting PRS' help, Ryan and the team head to Ohio to help a grieving family and determine if the family's house contributed to the untimely death of a daughter.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Lost Souls
programme.desc: PRS and Psychic/medium Michelle Belanger investigate a Pennsylvania home; where a mother named Kathy and her son Michael have both felt the presence of a young boy and hear voices calling, "Mom?" but no one is there.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Haunted Homecoming
programme.desc: Ryan brings PRS to his hometown of Sumter, SC to investigate a chilling case where a young boy was tragically shot and killed on a front doorstep while trick-or-treating on Halloween.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Shape Shifter
programme.desc: PRS travels to Shapleigh, Maine where a woman and her daughter are reporting attacks from a winged creature with sharp teeth. Psychic Chip Coffey arrives and senses a half-human, half animal presence.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Basement
programme.desc: A history of violence may connect the spiritual activity in Heidi's Ohio home to a long run of misery and cruelty.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Todmoredon Church
programme.desc: For the first time Yvette takes her fearless Most Haunted team to an ordained church and graveyard. But it’s the cellar that proves the most fearful as the team get caught in a small room and they are not alone.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Weir Mill
programme.desc: Yvette take her team to an abandoned mill where spirits are said to roam and satanic ritual taken place. What awaits them is an evening of fear that causes one of the team to leave early.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Ripon Workhouse
programme.desc: In a place where the homeless were kept and work was hard, death was often the only escape but it seems that wasn’t the way for some as their souls are said to roam this place.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Ripon Prison
programme.desc: A small prison in Yorkshire gives a big impact when Yvette and her team attempt to stay the night. Although many inmates were released some are still locked up and they are not happy.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Standon Hall Part 1
programme.desc: Yvette Fielding and her team take on a three-part investigation that tests them to the very core. A place that surprised intrigued and terrified the hardened team, making Standon Hall the most fearful place they have investigated.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Standon Hall Part 2
programme.desc: Part two of this mammoth investigation and Yvette has some harsh words for Karl as he decides to take a risk that proves too dangerous. With something that wants them out, the investigation gets aggressive.

programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: The Motorcycle, Blind Man's Dog, Deer Hunters, Tribal Curse, The Card Game.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 11
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: Dead Beat Daddy, Ghost Town, The Sewing Machine, The Sleepwalker, Money Laundry.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 12

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 9

programme.title: NEW: Scariest Night Of My Life

programme.title: NEW: Scariest Night Of My Life
programme.desc: Meet a 10-year-old boy who’s attacked by a spirit and left with the sign of the devil. Then witness a series of strange and unsettling events that take place when a woman is looking after her three-year-old niece in her new home.

programme.title: NEW: Scariest Night Of My Life
programme.desc: See what happens when Ron is snowed in at work and forced to stay overnight at a former insane asylum turned hospital. Meanwhile, 14-year-old Maria spots a strange silhouette that turns into something even more terrifying.

programme.title: A Haunting
programme.desc: Romie moves into a new home but begins to have nightmares and see shadowy spirits pacing.

programme.title: A Haunting: Nightmare In The Attic
programme.desc: The Fox family moves into a large old house in Lowell, Arkansas. Soon after, an angry ghost and demon begin to target the children, in their waking hours and in their dreams. The Fox family turns to a psychic, who confirms their worst nightmares.

programme.title: A Haunting: Masks Of Terror
programme.desc: Jeanette Osborne treats herself to a set of Haitian masks to decorate her California dream home. But shortly after, strange activity leads her to conclude that the masks are to blame.

programme.title: A Haunting: Shape Of Evil
programme.desc: Jay Yaple persuades his wife that Enfield, CT, is the perfect place for them. After a series of unexplained events, Jay discovers the house has a dark history of mysterious deaths. Anyone who attempts to come to their aid is driven away by the demon.
